response:
Hi everyone, I wanted to let you know that my time here is coming to an end, and my last day will be [date].  
I’m truly grateful for the support, teamwork, and friendships I’ve experienced while working with all of you.  
It has been a pleasure to learn from such a talented group, and I’ll carry these experiences with me moving forward.  
Thank you for making my time here so meaningful, and I wish you all continued success and happiness.  
Please keep in touch—I’d love to stay connected.
